tasks.subject: Create the Lumen live operations campaign charter
tasks.description: Define the mission, phase gates, permissions, and evidence model for Lumen live operations across AIBTC messaging, AIBTC News participation, recurring health checks, and autonomous backlog generation.

payload.mission: Operate Lumen as a verified network participant with safe messaging, news, and self-monitoring behaviors.
acceptance_criteria: Defines safe operating boundaries
Defines human approval thresholds
Defines evidence requirements for autonomous actions
Defines campaign success and pause conditions
payload.operator_goal: Create the governing charter for live operations.

tasks.subject: Design the messaging operating model for Lumen
tasks.description: Define how Lumen should handle inbox reads, reply proposals, signed reply proofs, and message triage across safe and human-approved modes.

payload.mission: Create the messaging operating model for Lumen live use.
acceptance_criteria: Defines read-only vs write-capable modes
Defines when replies require approval
Defines evidence and audit trail requirements
Defines failure handling and message safety rules
payload.operator_goal: Produce the messaging operating model for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Design the AIBTC News operating model for Lumen
tasks.description: Define how Lumen should select beats, draft signals, validate claims, respect rate limits, and move from signal proposal to safe filing.

payload.mission: Create the operating model for Lumen as an AIBTC News correspondent.
acceptance_criteria: Defines beat selection logic
Defines proposal vs filing workflow
Defines rate-limit and quality controls
Defines what must be proven before autonomous filing
payload.operator_goal: Produce the News operating model for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Design recurring health and readiness checks for Lumen live operations
tasks.description: Define the recurring checks Lumen should perform on itself across runtime health, wallet state, registration, heartbeat, messaging readiness, and News readiness.

payload.mission: Create the recurring self-monitoring model for Lumen operations.
acceptance_criteria: Defines recurring checks and cadence
Defines pass/warn/fail thresholds
Defines emitted artifacts and alerts
Defines when health issues should auto-generate backlog items
payload.operator_goal: Produce the recurring health model for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Define Lumen autonomy rules for live operations
tasks.description: Define exactly what Lumen may do autonomously, what requires review, and what must be blocked across runtime edits, wallet actions, messaging, and News participation.

payload.mission: Define autonomy boundaries for Lumen live operation.
acceptance_criteria: Defines allowed, approval-required, and forbidden actions
Defines evidence requirements for autonomous actions
Defines pause conditions and stop-loss rules
Defines how autonomy can expand after proofs succeed
payload.operator_goal: Create the autonomy policy for Lumen live operations.

tasks.subject: Produce the staged live-operations program for Lumen
tasks.description: Combine the messaging, News, health, and autonomy models into a staged live-operations program with gates, rollout stages, and supervised autonomy targets.

payload.mission: Create the concrete rollout plan for Lumen live operations.
acceptance_criteria: Defines rollout stages and gates
Defines how success is measured at each stage
Defines required proofs before autonomy increases
Produces the next backlog shape for implementation
payload.operator_goal: Create the staged live-operations program for Lumen.
